title: Area Coordinators
description: Learn about the Blue & Gold Officer (BGO) program for USNA Admissions. Find contacts and information for prospective students.
text:
Area Coordinators
Blue and Gold Officers are volunteers who serve as reliable sources of information about the Naval Academy, Navy, and Marine Corps. They are assigned to schools. If you would like the name and email address of the Blue and Gold Officer who serves your school, please send an email to your Area Coordinator where you live with the name of your school.
